testcase.name: getVehicleTypeBikeTest
testcase.system-out: Please select vehicle type from menu 1 CAR 2 BIKE
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/home/metina/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.14.5/byte-buddy-agent-1.14.5.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: processIncomingVehicleCarTest
testcase.system-out: Please select vehicle type from menu 1 CAR 2 BIKE Please type the vehicle registration number and press enter key Generated Ticket and saved in DB Please park your vehicle in spot number:1 Recorded in-time for vehicle number:ABC123 is:Tue Mar 17 15:21:51 CET 2026

testcase.name: getVehicleTypeCarTest
testcase.system-out: Please select vehicle type from menu 1 CAR 2 BIKE

testcase.name: processIncomingVehicleBikeTest
testcase.system-out: Please select vehicle type from menu 1 CAR 2 BIKE Please type the vehicle registration number and press enter key Generated Ticket and saved in DB Please park your vehicle in spot number:1 Recorded in-time for vehicle number:123ABC is:Tue Mar 17 15:21:51 CET 2026

testcase.name: processExitingVehicleTest
testcase.system-out: Please type the vehicle registration number and press enter key Heure d'arrivée : 1773753711405 Heure de départ : 1773757311407 msDuration = 3600002 Durée de stationnement en minutes : 60 Durée de stationnement en heures : 1 Durée de stationnement en secondes : 3600 Nombre de fois que ce véhicule a utilisé notre parking : 0 Please pay the parking fare:1.5 Recorded out-time for vehicle number:ABCDEF is:Tue Mar 17 15:21:51 CET 2026
